digest.en: US Marines boarded a merchant ship in the Arabian Sea suspected to be headed to Iran. The incident comes as Trump claims Iran is in a "state of collapse" after allegedly being informed by Tehran. King Charles urged NATO unity and Ukraine support in a US Congress speech.
digest.hi: सरकार ने सुप्रीम कोर्ट के वर्ग में आंतरिक आरक्षण लागू करने का आदेश दिया है। इससे 56432 पदों पर सीधी भर्ती का रास्ता साफ हो गया है। युगांडा में मानव तस्करी और साइबर ठगी के खिलाफ बड़ी कार्रवाई हुई है, जिसमें भारतीयों समेत 231 विदेशी नागरिक हिरासत में लिए गए हैं।

articles.title: U.S. Marines board merchant ship in Arabian Sea suspected to be headed to Iran
articles.summary: U. S. Marines boarded a merchant ship in the Arabian Sea, suspected of heading to Iran, but released it after a search confirmed no Iranian port call. The incident occurred without incident, with CENTCOM stating the ship was allowed to continue its voyage.

articles.title: UN sanctions brother of Sudan's RSF leader, Colombian mercenaries
articles.summary: The UN imposed sanctions on the brother of Sudan's RSF leader and Colombian mercenaries, citing unspecified reasons. Reuters reported the development without providing further details on the individuals or the nature of the sanctions.

articles.title: King Charles calls for NATO unity, Ukraine support in US Congress speech
articles.summary: King Charles called for NATO unity and Ukraine support in a speech to the US Congress, highlighting national friendship but also delivering pointed messages during his four-day US visit. The UK sovereign's remarks were seen as a gesture of solidarity with Western allies.

articles.title: Trump claims Iran 'just' informed U.S. it's in 'state of collapse'
articles.summary: Donald Trump claimed that Iran told the US it is in a "state of collapse". Ceasefire efforts appear stalled, with Iran resisting US attempts to dictate terms. Ceasefire efforts appears at a standstill, with Iran saying Washington could no longer dictate terms.

articles.title: US conditions for paying UN dues include China curbs, report says
articles.summary: The US has set conditions for paying UN dues, including curbs on China, according to a report by the South China Morning Post. The exact nature of the conditions and their implications for US-UN relations remain unclear.

articles.title: Trump hails US-UK bond as he welcomes British royals
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump welcomed British royals, hailing the "cherished bond" between the United States and the United Kingdom. The gesture marked a symbolic display of the two nations' long-standing friendship and diplomatic ties.

articles.title: Trump scolds Germany’s Merz for criticism of Iran war
articles.summary: US President Trump criticized German Chancellor Merz for opposing the Iran war, saying he doesn't know what he's talking about. Trump defended the war as necessary. US president says German chancellor 'doesn't know what he's talking about', defends war on Iran as necessary.

articles.title: Amid Iran War and Tensions with Neighbors, U.A.E. Goes Its Own Way
articles.summary: The United Arab Emirates left OPEC, charting its own course amid tensions with Saudi Arabia and the Iran war. This decision has rocked the region. The United Arab Emirates’ decision to leave OPEC has rocked the region, underscoring how the country, at odds with Saudi Arabia, is increasingly charting its own course.

articles.title: King Charles urges 'reconciliation' in address to U.S. Congress amid Trump tensions
articles.summary: King Charles addressed the US Congress, calling for reconciliation and renewal amid tensions with President Trump. He noted the two countries have always found ways to come together. In an address to the U. S.

articles.title: US regulator to review Disney broadcast licences after Jimmy Kimmel joke about Melania Trump
articles.summary: A US regulator will review Disney's broadcast licenses after Jimmy Kimmel joked about Melania Trump. The White House is pressuring Disney to fire Kimmel. The move comes as the White House pressures Disney-owned ABC to fire Kimmel after he called Melania an "expectant widow".

articles.title: Iran war and Strait of Hormuz stuck in limbo as Trump mulls latest Iranian offer
articles.summary: Trump is considering Iran's latest offer as the Iran war and Strait of Hormuz remain in limbo. The situation is currently at a standstill. Live Updates: Iran war and Strait of Hormuz stuck in limbo as Trump mulls latest Iranian offer CBS News.

articles.title: Trump claims Tehran admitted it's in 'State of Collapse' - as UAE quits OPEC
articles.summary: The United Arab Emirates has quit the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries, citing a desire to diversify its economy. The move comes as US President Trump claims Iran has admitted to being in a state of collapse.

articles.title: How a controversial gas pipeline deal could further stall Bosnia's EU accession
articles.summary: A US-backed gas pipeline deal could hinder Bosnia's bid to join the European Union. Brussels warns that a deal with a company linked to Trump allies could jeopardize the country's EU aspirations.

articles.title: U.K. PM Keir Starmer wins crunch Parliament vote over ethics inquiry
articles.summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer won a parliamentary vote against an ethics inquiry into his appointment of Peter Mandelson. The vote tally was 335 to 223. Members of Parliament voted 335 to 223 against a Privileges Committee investigation into whether he had misled the House of Commons over the appointment of disgraced peer Peter Mandelson.

articles.title: Iraq’s Prime Minister-Designate Thrust Into U.S.-Iran Power Struggle
articles.summary: Iraq's Prime Minister-designate, Ali al-Zaidi, faces pressure from the US to curb Iranian influence. He must form a new coalition government while navigating the complex US-Iran power struggle in the region.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Trump Dissatisfied With Iran Proposal To Lift Hormuz Blockade
articles.summary: US President Trump expressed dissatisfaction with Iran's proposal to lift the Hormuz blockade. The development is part of ongoing ceasefire talks between the US, Israel, and Iran. US Israel Iran War Ceasefire News LIVE Updates:.

articles.title: Young Palestinian Artists in Gaza Exhibit Their Impressions of War as a Fragile Ceasefire Holds
articles.summary: Palestinian artists in Gaza exhibited their war impressions amid a fragile ceasefire. Young Palestinian Artists in Gaza Exhibit Their Impressions of War as a Fragile Ceasefire Holds Military. com.

articles.title: Iraqi president nominates Ali al-Zaidi as PM-designate
articles.summary: Iraqi President nominated Ali al-Zaidi as PM-designate. In January, Mr. Trump threatened to stop all support for Iraq if two-time ex-premier Maliki, who has close ties to Iran, returned to power.

articles.title: Iran's 'Plunder' Jibe At US After It Seizes Tankers
articles.summary: Iran accused the US of piracy after it seized tankers. Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei said the operation effectively endorsed piracy. Iran's 'Plunder' Jibe At US After It Seizes Tankers.

articles.title: Christine Dawood reveals the harrowing moment she received her family’s remains 9 months after
articles.summary: Christine Dawood received her family's remains 9 months after the incident. Christine Dawood reveals the harrowing moment she received her family’s remains 9 months after.

articles.title: Israel using water access as 'weapon' in Gaza: MSF
articles.summary: Israel used water access as a weapon in Gaza, MSF reported. The charity documented several incidents where its clearly identified water trucks and boreholes had been shot at or destroyed.

articles.title: नेतन्याहू को सत्ता से हटाने के लिए दो धुर विरोधी नेताओं ने हाथ मिलाया
articles.summary: है. नफ़ताली बेनेट और याएर लापिड ने अपनी पार्टियों का विलय कर एक नई पार्टी बनाई है. इस नई पार्टी का नाम 'याचाड' है. पूर्व दक्षिणपंथी प्रधानमंत्री नफ़ताली बेनेट और मध्यमार्गी विपक्षी नेता याएर लापिड ने अपनी पार्टियों का विलय कर एक नई पार्टी 'याचाड' बनाने की घोषणा की है, जिसका मतलब होता है 'साथ साथ'.

articles.summary: रजत किशन फिर विवादों में घिर गए हैं. एक वीडियो में पेट्रोल बम जैसी विस्फोटक एक्टिविटी दिखाई देने के बाद पुलिस जांच कर रही है. रजत किशन के खिलाफ कई सवाल खड़े हो रहे हैं.

articles.title: दो पुरुषों से प्रेग्नेंट हुई महिला के जुड़वां बच्चे, जानिए मेडिकल साइंस इस बारे में क्या कहता है?
articles.summary: दो पुरुषों से प्रेग्नेंट हुई महिला के जुड़वां बच्चे हुए। दुनिया भर में इस तरह के केवल 20 मामलों के बारे में जानकारी उपलब्ध है। इन जुड़वां बच्चों की मां तो एक ही थी, लेकिन इनके पिता अलग-अलग थे.

articles.title: ईरान होर्मुज खोलने को तैयार, अमेरिका से नाकेबंदी हटाने की मांग; ट्रंप ने प्रस्ताव ठुकराया
articles.summary: ईरान ने कहा है कि वह होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य खोलने को तैयार है, अगर अमेरिका नाकेबंदी हटा दे। अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने ईरान का प्रस्ताव ठुकरा दिया है। पश्चिम एशिया संघर्ष: ईरान होर्मुज खोलने को तैयार, अमेरिका से नाकेबंदी हटाने की मांग; ट्रंप ने प्रस्ताव ठुकराया Amar Ujala।
